segments.text: Indian brands don't just copy, they copy
with confidence. And sometimes the quote
actually let them get away with it. So
here are the most clever ones. First we
have Mech Patel Foods, a small snack
shop using the mech prefix. McDonald
said, "That's our thing." And Mech Patel
replied, "Bro, it's just a word and you
can't own it." And the fight is already
going on. Even a tiny shop can keep up
with a global giant in a quote. This is
smart but not funnier than Sardar B
because it took Starbucks green circle
and stars but swapped the mermaid for a
sardar in turban. It looked like a joke
but on a big scale. Starbucks soon and
the court said too close you have to
change it. So they changed the name and
the color from green to blue. Same wipe
less trouble. And then comes a copy so
obvious even Facebook have to step in. A
bakery called itself face bake. Same
blue and white look and same writing
style. It was giving the exact same vibe
as Facebook but with cake. Funny for
Instagram but not funny for quote. So
Meta suit and Delhi High Court banned
Facebook from using that name or look
anymore. That's how this joke ended.
